title: obsidian29's Tuff Backport
description: Backports tuff blocks from 1.21 experimentals to 1.20.1. Beta.
body:
Hello everyone!

I got tired of not having the nice shiny new tuff blocks in 1.20.1 to go with my mod AXAR-Adapt, which has so many different variants of existing vanilla stones, and new stones. I wanted tuff!

So this afternoon I thought, 'what the heck am I waiting for?' and I grabbed the textures from 1.20.6's jar file and made a tuff tiles texture to go with it, and shoved it into a nice brand new mod.

All textures except tuff tiles are original Mojang textures, I'm just borrowing them and make no claim to them. Code, and especially my tuff tiles texture, are ARR.

If you find any of my textures, code, or anything else I made posted anywhere except my own Discord or Modrinth, it is there without my permission. Please let me know if you see this! I can't take responsibility for the safety of downloading them and if someone's willing to take it without my permission, who knows what else they did to it along the way.
